name: Peeks Park
description: Come play pickleball at Peeks Park in Cedartown, GA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: Rockmart City Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Rockmart City Tennis Courts in Rockmart, GA! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.
